Cooper Group will acquire IBMs mortgage servicing business.
HCL will acquire select IBM software products.
Events)   On November 12, 2007, IBM and Cognos announced that the two companies have entered into a definitive agreement for IBM to acquire Cognos.
The press release is Attachment I of this Form 8-K.
Directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend and authorized additional funds for use in the companys stock repurchase program.
Events On January 25, 2007, IBM and Ricoh announced formation of a joint venture company based on IBMs Printing Systems Division.
The press release is Attachment I of this Form 8-K.
Events)   On April 25, 2006, IBM announced that the IBM Board of Directors has declared a dividend increase and authorized additional funds for use in the companys stock repurchase program.
The press release is Attachment I of this Form 8-K.
IBM announced that it has changed its U.S. defined benefit pension plans and that it plans to redesign its 401(k) savings plan, effective in January 2008.
On July 26, 2005, IBM announced that the IBM Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly dividend.
Disclosure)   On May 1, 2005, IBM announced the completion of the acquisition of IBMs Personal Computing Division by Lenovo Group Limited.
IBM announced that the IBM Board of Directors has declared a dividend increase and authorized additional funds for use in the companys stock repurchase program.
Attachment I of this Form 8-K, which is hereby furnished, contains combined financial statements for PCD at June 30, 2004, December 31, 2003, 2002 and 2001.
Limited announced a definitive agreement under which Lenovo will acquire IBMs Personal Computing division.
